summary: GH-91 implementation is approved for the input-schema-only PR. The schema constrains the sample read input to public Example Domain URLs, safe requested fields, and declared invalid input classes without adding runtime, fixture, validator, registry, or cross-repo behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json sites/example/read-public-page/schemas/input.schema.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-91/build-evidence.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-91 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-91 --json` at head `cec6afeb4fe881892d8db3cef69457113eda0f0b`.
follow_ups: GH-92 must add the normalized output schema before Core can validate returned data.
GH-93, GH-95, and GH-97 must add resource, fixture, and post-check assets before stable admission.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: No correctness, safety, or scope blockers found for the GH-91 input schema contract at reviewed head.
